title: Embelia ribes (Vidanga, Jadan) revisited: from traditional Ayurvedic and East Asian use to AI-augmented scaffold-hopping for skin fibrosis with embelin parent and EMB-3 derivative case study
prior_history: ChemRxiv rejected 2026-04-30 (scope mismatch); title romanized to ASCII (Vidanga, Jadan) in v0.3 and resubmitted to bioRxiv 2026-05-03.
